free_ai_resource_catalog.summary: Free-first catalog of AI tools, coding tools, image/3D/music resources, serverless/BaaS, game assets, inference APIs, and compute options.

korean_public_api_catalog.summary: Korean-service Public API index with 270+ Korean APIs and a global API companion document.

guardrails: No revenue guarantee: every paid motion must be validated with real leads, contracts, or checkout tests.
No secrets in git: API keys, webhook secrets, payout IDs, bank data, and live payment keys belong only in provider secret stores.
Real payout/revenue-account connection cannot be completed by code alone; it requires authenticated provider dashboards, business verification, and sensitive bank information.
Archived repositories stay read-only unless explicit action-time confirmation is given to unarchive or deploy.

payment_connectors.best_for: Korean card/simple-payment checkout for service packages and SMB pilots
manual_account_steps: Business verification in Toss Payments console
Bank payout account registration in provider dashboard
payment_connectors.secret_rule: Use provider dashboard or Wrangler/GitHub secrets only; never commit keys or payout data.

payment_connectors.best_for: Korean multi-PG abstraction, webhook-based payment state, and future payout workflows
manual_account_steps: Bank payout account registration in provider dashboard
payment_connectors.secret_rule: Keep V2 API secret and webhook secret server-side only.

payment_connectors.best_for: Global SaaS/template sales, paid reports, subscriptions, and low-code checkout experiments
manual_account_steps: Payout bank registration in Stripe dashboard
payment_connectors.secret_rule: Use test mode first; store live keys only in deployment secret stores.

deployment_targets.use_for: Static demos, portfolio surfaces, Vite/Next static exports, public docs
Thin APIs, lead capture, payment webhooks, public API proxying, metering gates
D1 for lead/payment state, KV for config/quota cache, R2 for reports/assets/exports
secret_surface: Binding names only in config; credentials stay in Cloudflare

deployment_targets.use_for: Managed auth, Postgres/Firestore, storage for pilots that need user accounts quickly

deployment_targets.target: Render / Oracle / GCP / Hugging Face Spaces
deployment_targets.use_for: Long-running APIs, Python demos, GPU demos, or private compute when Workers is not enough

repositories.deployment_path: GitHub profile front door; link to Cloudflare Pages portfolio and repo-local lead routes.
repositories.monetization_path: Architecture inspection sprint / implementation package routed by buyer lane.

manual_steps_required: Provider account login/business verification
Payout/bank account registration inside provider dashboard
Production webhook URL registration
Move from test keys to live keys only after legal/business readiness
payment_account_wiring.automation_limit: Code, env names, webhook handlers, and docs can be prepared here; real bank/payout account linking requires authenticated provider dashboards and secret values.

Production webhook URL registration
Move from test keys to live keys only after legal/business readiness
payment_account_wiring.automation_limit: Code, env names, webhook handlers, and docs can be prepared here; real bank/payout account linking requires authenticated provider dashboards and secret values.

repositories.guardrail: Keep archived/read-only until a buyer signal justifies revival. Do not unarchive, change visibility, or deploy without explicit action-time confirmation.

repositories.deployment_path: Local-first package for sensitive files; Cloudflare Pages/Workers only for sanitized demos and lead capture.
